what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only channel attachment record that associates attachment att-3be062b1 (type board_items) with board item item-068c8b19 in the dragnet-development channel and records when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
The target field uses a board:// URI pointing to item-068c8b19.
The added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset.
The filename matches the id field.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Uses a board:// URI scheme for cross-resource referencing.
concerns: No body or explanatory text beyond metadata.
Meaning depends entirely on the external board item.
No author or versioning information is present.
notes: A metadata-only channel attachment that points a board_items attachment at board item item-068c8b19 in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or state does board item item-068c8b19 represent?
Who added this attachment and for what reason?
Does the referenced board item still exist?
What specific semantics does attachment_type board_items imply?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated beyond the metadata fields; the fields accurately describe a board_items attachment targeting a specific board item.
apparent_themes: Traceability between channel attachments and board items.
intention_signals: To create a persistent, timestamped link between a channel attachment and a specific board item so the attachment can be located and audited in board context.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped association between the dragnet-development channel and board item item-068c8b19 via an attachment record, supporting lookup and audit of board-related attachments.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file of type board_items in the dragnet-development channel that references board item item-068c8b19 and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a timestamped link from a channel attachment to a specific board item for retrieval and audit.
